steps.title: Identify what a contrast requires
steps.content: The student wants to contrast green usage, which means highlighting a difference in how each country uses green. The clue: the notes list which road categories have green in each country.

steps.title: Match the difference in green usage to the choices
steps.content: The notes show US uses green on highways and major roadways (plus minor), while UK uses it only on major roadways. B states exactly this difference: green on highways and major roadways in US vs only major roadways in UK. A shifts to blue, C falsely equates both countries' green usage, D omits green entirely. This difference in scope accomplishes the goal of contrasting green. That matches choice B — B is correct.
